reviewText:
Had such a wonderful experience at Curious Tails! From the moment I stepped in, Kim and Nelson were incredibly warm, patient, and genuinely passionate about what they do. They took the time to walk me through everything and made sure I felt confident and informed every step of the way.

The puppies were well taken care of — clean, active, and clearly loved. I really appreciated the transparency with health checks and all the details provided, which gave me a lot of peace of mind.

What stood out the most was the aftercare support — you can tell they truly care about both the pets and the owners, not just making a sale.

I got my furkid from them on the very day in 2025, and she has brought so much joy into my life. I’m really glad I chose Curious Tails.

Highly recommend Curious Tails to anyone looking for a trustworthy and caring pet shop. 🐶💖
replyText: Thank you so much, Jenn! 🐶💖 We're absolutely thrilled that your furkid has brought so much joy into your life, and it was a pleasure having Kim and Nelson help you find your perfect match — your trust means everything to us, and we're here for you every step of the journey ahead!

reviewText:
I had an absolutely wonderful experience with this pet shop and highly recommend them to anyone looking to welcome a new puppy into their home.

From the start, their pricing was very reasonable and transparent, which gave me confidence right away. What truly impressed me was their level of service—they even arranged for the puppy to be delivered directly to my home at no extra charge, which made the whole process so convenient and stress-free.

They went above and beyond by helping to handle the licence transfer and patiently guiding me through the pet ownership course requirements. As a new owner, this kind of support made a huge difference and gave me peace of mind.

On top of that, they provided a generous starter kit that included a full set of food and essential accessories for my puppy—everything I needed to get started immediately. They also covered the full vaccination, which shows how much they genuinely care about the well-being of their animals.

Overall, their professionalism, care, and dedication really stood out. You can tell they are not just selling pets—they truly want both the puppy and the owner to have the best possible start together.
replyText: Thank you so much, Ash! 🐾 We're thrilled to hear that your journey with us was smooth and meaningful—it's wonderful to know that our support through the delivery, licensing, and course guidance made such a positive difference as you welcomed your new family member home. We truly believe puppies and their owners deserve the best possible start together, and your kind words mean the world to us!
